title: Khammam Fort
tagline: Khammam Fort — heritage city of Telangana

overview.short: Khammam Fort is a hill fort with a history of over a thousand years.
overview.description: Khammam Fort is a hill fort with a history of over a thousand years. History says that it was built during the Kakatiya period. This place, mentioned as "Khammamettu" in ancient inscriptions, is a historical center that combines spirituality, strategic importance, and architectural splendor. The foundation stone for the construction of this fort was laid in 950 CE. Three farmers from the village of Velugumatla—Ranga Reddy, Laxma Reddy, and Velma Reddy—discovered a treasure while working in the fields and, with the permission of the Kakatiya lords, used the money to build the fort.

topPlaces.name: Khammam
topPlaces.description: Khammam is the city in Khammam district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is the fourth largest city in the state.

topPlaces.name: Duddepudi
topPlaces.description: Duddepudi is a village in Konijerla mandal, Khammam district, Telangana, India.

topPlaces.name: Lakaram lake
topPlaces.description: Lakaram lake is a lake in the city of Khammam. Located nearly 4 kilometres (2.5 mi) from a bus station, it is one of the main tourist attractions of the city.

topPlaces.name: Diocese of Khammam
topPlaces.description: The Roman Catholic Diocese of Khammam (Latin: Khammamen(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Khammam in the ecclesiastical province of Hyderabad in India.

topPlaces.name: Khanapuram Haveli
topPlaces.description: Khanapuram Haveli is a census town in Khammam district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is located in Khammam (urban) mandal of Khammam revenue division.

topPlaces.name: Polepalli
topPlaces.description: Polepalli is a village in Khammam district in Telangana, India. Polepalli is approximately 10 km north of Khammam.

topPlaces.name: Mudigonda
topPlaces.description: Mudigonda is a town and revenue-divisional headquarters located 14 km from Khammam, the headquarters of the Khammam District of Telangana, India.

items.note: Khammam is the city in Khammam district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is the fourth largest city in the state.
Duddepudi is a village in Konijerla mandal, Khammam district, Telangana, India.
Lakaram lake is a lake in the city of Khammam. Located nearly 4 kilometres (2.5 mi) from a bus station, it is one of the main tourist attractions of the city.
The Roman Catholic Diocese of Khammam (Latin: Khammamen(sis)) is a diocese located in the city of Khammam in the ecclesiastical province of Hyderabad in India.
Khanapuram Haveli is a census town in Khammam district of the Indian state of Telangana. It is located in Khammam (urban) mandal of Khammam revenue division.
Polepalli is a village in Khammam district in Telangana, India. Polepalli is approximately 10 km north of Khammam.
Mudigonda is a town and revenue-divisional headquarters located 14 km from Khammam, the headquarters of the Khammam District of Telangana, India.

faq.q: What is the best time to visit Khammam Fort?
faq.a: The best time to visit Khammam Fort is Oct – Mar. Summers are 26–40°C and winters are 12–28°C.

faq.q: How do I reach Khammam Fort?
faq.a: The nearest airport is Vijayawada Airport (105 km) and the nearest railway station is Vijayawada Junction (96 km). Roads are generally good; check seasonal/monsoon conditions before high-altitude or remote stretches.

faq.q: How many days are enough for Khammam Fort?
faq.a: 3 days are usually enough to cover the top attractions of Khammam Fort at a relaxed pace.

faq.q: How much does a hotel cost in Khammam Fort?
faq.a: Stays in Khammam Fort start from ₹900 per night, with options across 4 price categories.

faq.q: What are the top places to visit in Khammam Fort?
faq.a: The top attractions are Khammam, Duddepudi, Lakaram lake, Diocese of Khammam, Khanapuram Haveli.
